news.title: Goldman Lops $500 Off Gold Target on No Fed Cuts This Year
news.description: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. cut its year-end gold forecast by $500 an ounce as the Federal Reserve is no longer seen reducing rates in 2026.

news.title: Stock markets rise to record highs in Japan, South Korea on West Asia truce; dollar strengthens
news.description: Stock markets in Japan and South Korea hit record highs as the dollar strengthens amid geopolitical developments and Fed rate expectations.
